entry.title: Re: Is it possible to post fixed tax amount in countries with tax jurisdiction (e.g. US)?
entry.content: Based on reviewing associated notes and the guided answers on tax determination I would think this is only possible with the tax jurisdiction countries if you fudge with the pricing procedures. I'd play in our sandbox but we don't generally need to apply tax so too much configuration would be missing our environment to play with it.

entry.title: Re: SQ02 Infoset join to additional field
entry.content:
Alright, So my initial plan did work finally. I did a beginner mistake when I tought the process order number in AFPO was, lets say '1234', but I realised that the unconverted value is '00001234'.

So what I did is update the code of my field ZAUFNR to be : CONCATENATE '0000' VBAK-IHREZ INTO ZAUFNR.

Then I added the table AFPO in my infoset as an additional table where AUFNR = ZAUFNR and POSNR = '0001'.

It works perfectly!

entry.title: Re: Create Extension Wizard to Create SAP UI5 Extension
entry.content: did you find the 'Create Extension' wizard? I am also looking to extend fiori application that is not supported by adaptation project but unable to do so

entry.title: Re: Disable or remove permissions for the Introductory Te...
entry.content: Hello @AF-TJX, I would suggest opening a support ticket if this is not working as expected.

entry.title: Thank you for a great onsite event in SAP Copenhagen 2024!
entry.content:
The Planning Excellence team thank you all for a great event in September; with some great feedback provided.

We are looking forward to next year; and if you have the wish to host or speak at our next event don't hesitate to write a comment here or reach out to emil.van.leeuwen@sap.com.

I'd be happy to hear more feedback or inputs on how we can make it even better next year; if you have questions about topics, presentations or need a follow up conversation - reach out!

Best regards Emil Van Leeuwen
Customer Success Partner, SAP Nordics

entry.title: Unable to Find Create Extension Wizard to extend SAP Fiori application
entry.content:
I have a requirement to extend standard Fiori application - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery (F2502), this app does not support Adaptation Project, Hence SAP suggests to create SAPUI5 extension project using Create Extension Wizard.

I am unable to find Create Extension Wizard in SAP BAS, anyone has idea how to extens this app F2502?

entry.title: Re: Error during client build SSAM 2405: Could not find c...
entry.content:
Please make sure you are using the correct combination of MDK version and SSAM MDK Plug in versions.  You mention using MDK 24.4.2 but the plugin version it looks like you are using is 2405.0.4 which is for use with MDK 24.4.3.

Please either download the 2405.0.3 Android plugin to use with MDK 24.4.2 or upgrade to MDK 24.4.3 and use the version you have.

The compatibility matrix can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Open hyperlink in new tab in instead in same window,...
entry.content: There is hope for the future. In the OData @ SAP - Vocabularies UI Vocabulary you can already find for DataFieldWithUrl with the possibility to annotate URL with LinkTarget. But I think it's currently not supported in RAP and also not in Fiori Elements.

entry.title: Re: Pixelated / Low Resolution Image in the Image Control
entry.content:
I created an app using the URL you provided and am unable to see the same pixelation when used in my Object Cell and Image Section compared to the Open Document.

Here are screenshots from my iPad for the page with Object Cell / Image Section / Button with Image versus Open Document

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in Germany 2024-09 Recap
entry.content:
In mid-September, we held two SAP CodeJam events in Germany: in Isernhagen and Stuttgart. The events focused on getting started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python.

The first one was kindly hosted by Inwerken, and it was great to catch up with @EnnoWulff, who took this picture of me below...

...inviting participants to join our free online Devtoberfest event starting on September 23: https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest-blog-posts/devtoberfest-2024-welcome/ba-p/9358

Then on the way to Stuttgart I had a chance to stop by our SAP headquarters in Walldorf...

...where I had a chance to meet with @dinah for the first time in-real-life...

...and to play with some cool technology.

The second event was kindly hosted by Bosch Digital in Stuttgart and I would like to thank Gamze Öztürk and @AjayKulkarni for the effort to organize it!

And it is always a pleasure to catch up with @cyclingfisch_ with whom we had our micro SAP Stammtisch 🍻

Now, the next stops are in Lisbon on September 25th hosted by SAP Portugal: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-lisboa-pt/ev-p/13773843 and in Porto on September 27 hosted by SAP Inside Track Porto: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-porto-pt/ev-p/13770170 

Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-quot-as-a-new-sap/ba-p/13574098

entry.title: Re: Schedule a job for SAP integration suite iflow from SAP Job scheduler Service
entry.content:
Hi All,

Solution is to create a REST api using API-M in integration suite. Then use the same REST API in Job scheduling Service.

entry.title: Re: Schedule a job for SAP integration suite iflow from S...
entry.content: Hi All, Solution is to create a REST api using API-M in integration suite. Then use the same REST API in Job scheduling Service.

entry.content: thanks man, was torturing myself until your comment saved me

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce 2205 Patch 28 Upgrade Running into Class...
entry.content: After we created the two newly created cache regions, we did not face this issue so far. Marking it close for now.

entry.title: Re: Extending legacy Fiori apps in BAS
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for this post, How to extend applications that are not supported in adaptation project, for example Application F2502 is not supported in adaptation project, so how to extend such applications??

entry.title: Does anyone have their customization working so that /PPE for retro
entry.content: Does anyone have their customization working for /PPE in retro scenarios?  If we get WT's in retro that are added to /PPE, it reduces the taxable income in the "for-period" (sending BSI the /PPE corrected amount for the prior period).  However the WT taxable amount goes to BSI in the "in-period" and is taxed when paid.  Is this how it should work or should the additional /PPE also be applied to the "in-period" as when paid?

entry.title: Re: Automatic Subaccount Migration to another Region
entry.content: You're right! It'll be a good opportunity to test Terraform.

entry.title: Re: Replication of HANA Views from on prem HANA to datasp...
entry.content: unfortunately, when importing HANA views as remote tables, SAP Datasphere does not automatically support passing input parameters directly. You can submit this as a new idea on customer influence page

entry.title: Set Default Value in RAP Managed App (without draft)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on custom List Report Fiori Elements App(Managed without draft). I want to default a date value in input field if its not provided by the user based on a status field.

Example:

IF Status = 'Yes' THEN Date Mandatory.

IF Status = 'No' THEN Date is optional & if left blank by user a default value has to assigned before Save.

I tried implementing the requirement using determination but it only works for Create and not for Update.

If I use Create and Update in my determination it goes into infinite loop.

Please Advise. Thank you.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model , SAP BTP, ABAP environment @Andre_Fischer @JessieCheah

entry.title: Default Security Properties
entry.content:
In Cloud Portal, when I open Environment -> Services -> hcs_common, I can define some properties in the text field. I have a few secure properties e.g. master encryption password, and I see those properties in other projects are defined on the right in the "Default Security Properties" section. How would I define e.g. master encryption password on the right in that section instead of putting the password itself in the text form together with all the other properties in hcs_common?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Default Security Properties
entry.content:
Hello customer,

Thanks for your patience.

The "Default Security Properties" normally contains only encryption keys generated automatically by the system.
It does not allow customer-generated properties.
To best way to address a master encryption password should be set in a static file instead of the Service Properties.
More details you can read in the SAP KBA: 3011191 - How to Manage a Static File Set in the Cloud Portal - SAP Commerce Cloud
Regards,
Sabrina
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Issue with Profit Center Hierarchy Display in S/4HANA Report Apps
entry.content:
Good day, experts,
I’m currently facing an issue related to the profit center hierarchy in S/4HANA.
In the "Manage Global Hierarchy" Fiori App, I created and activated a global hierarchy by importing an existing one with nodes created in the GUI. However, when running some standard apps to check if the profit center hierarchy is displayed, it did not appear.
I also checked HRRP_REP, HRRP_NODE, and the "Set Report Relevancy" app, but the profit center hierarchy wasn’t listed there. There are several profit centers created in the GUI that are not showing up in the apps.

Could you please advise how I can proceed to ensure the profit center hierarchy is displayed?

Thank you!

Best regards,

Sarau

entry.title: Re: Creating an OData services in SAP system for Custom Tables
entry.content: Deleting my comment

entry.title: Re: Add a Custom Screen on Purchase Requisition Header
entry.content:
Excellent work! It helped a lot in my endeavor .

Just one more thing. For the ME52N scenario when the user only change the custom header data but leave standard data unchanged (EBAN, EBKN, TEXT, etc), I carefully follow your steps but the application still didn't not recognize the changing of the document. I kept getting the message "06022 No data changed".

To overcome this, just in case anybody need it, I've implemented a couple of extra artifacts:

Additional implicit enhancement at the BEGIN OF METHOD if_purchase_requisition~get_transaction_state of CLASS localted at INCLUDE LMEREQF12:

 

  METHOD if_purchase_requisition~get_transaction_state.
"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""$"$\SE:(1) Clase LCL_REQ_HEADER, Interface IF_PURCHASE_REQUISITION, Método GET_TRANSACTION_STATE, Inicio                                                     A
*$*$-Start: (1)---------------------------------------------------------------------------------$*$*
ENHANCEMENT 5  ZMM_PR_CUSTOM_TAB_MEREQ.    "active version
IF my_state->trtyp  EQ ver.
  "Check modification state of custom header fields
  CALL FUNCTION 'ZMM_PR_GET_TRANSACTION_STATE'
    EXPORTING
      io_header  = me
    CHANGING
      ch_changed = my_state->changed.
ENDIF.
ENDENHANCEMENT.
*$*$-End:   (1)---------------------------------------------------------------------------------$*$*

 


Additional function module ZMM_PR_GET_TRANSACTION_STATE inside same func.group ZME51N_HEADER_ENHM:

FUNCTION zmm_pr_get_transaction_state.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Interfase local
*"  IMPORTING
*"     REFERENCE(IO_HEADER) TYPE REF TO  IF_PURCHASE_REQUISITION
*"  CHANGING
*"     REFERENCE(CH_CHANGED) TYPE  FLAG OPTIONAL
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

  DATA: ls_header TYPE mereq_header.
  ls_header = io_header->get_data( ).
  CALL FUNCTION 'ZMM_PR_CHECK_TRANSACTION_STATE'
    EXPORTING
      im_banfn   = ls_header-banfn
    CHANGING
      ch_changed = ch_changed.

ENDFUNCTION.

Leaved FM ZMM_PR_CHECK_TRANSACTION_STATE implementation untouched.

After this, it works perfectly.

Thanks again!.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: كود إحالة B I N G X: BETBET (مكافأة التسجيل في B I N G X)
entry.content:
إذا كنت تبحث عن تداول العملات وزيادة مكافآتك، تأكد من استخدام رمز الإحالة BETBET عند التسجيل كمستخدم جديد في منصة B I N G X. ستساعدك هذه الدليل في فهم كيفية عمل برنامج إحالة منصة B I N G X، وكيفية التسجيل باستخدام رمز الإحالة BETBET، والفوائد الرائعة التي يمكنك فتحها. دعنا نبدأ!

النقاط الرئيسية:

  • B I N G X هي منصة رائدة في تداول النسخ معروفة برسومها المنخفضة، وتنوع عروضها بما في ذلك تداول السلع والعقود الآجلة، وواجهة مستخدم سهلة للمبتدئين.
  • من خلال التسجيل باستخدام رمز الإحالة BETBET، يمكنك كسب ما يصل إلى 5000 USDT كمكافآت بعد إكمال مهام مثل التسجيل، والتحقق من الهوية (KYC)، والإيداع، والتداول.
  • توفر B I N G X برنامج إحالة وترويج يتيح لك كسب حتى 50% عمولات من رسوم تداول أصدقائك عندما يستخدمون رمز الإحالة الخاص بك.

ما هو رمز إحالة B I N G X؟

رمز الإحالةBETBET
مكافأة التسجيلالحصول على مهام بقيمة تصل إلى 5,125 USDT
مكافأة الترحيبحتى 30 USDT
خصم رسوم التداول5% مدى الحياة
التحقق من الهويةغير مطلوب

رمز الإحالة هو سلسلة فريدة تصدرها B I N G X تتيح للمستخدمين الجدد المشاركة في برنامج الإحالة والحصول على المكافآت مثل مكافآت التسجيل، وخصومات رسوم التداول، والترقيات الحصرية. يمكن الإشارة إلى هذا الرمز أيضاً باسم رمز الترويج، أو رمز الدعوة، أو معرف الإحالة.

رمز الإحالة BETBET هو مفتاحك لفتح مكافأة تسجيل بقيمة 5000 دولار أمريكي وخصم بنسبة 5% على رسوم التداول مدى الحياة. من خلال استخدام BETBET، ستتاح لك أيضاً الفرصة لمشاركة رمز الإحالة الخاص بك مع أصدقائك وكسب حتى 50% عمولات على رسوم تداولهم.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am writing to express my strong interest in participating in the free SAP certification exam, as I meet the eligibility criteria outlined in your program. I am a woman and currently seeking to switch my career mid-life. I have been worked in the information technology field for 4 years, though not with SAP. Recently, I participated in a company training course on SAP and became interested in it, which has motivated me to pursue a career related to SAP.  I believe that obtaining SAP certification will provide me with the necessary skills and knowledge to successfully transition into a new career path. I  would greatly appreciate the opportunity to take part in this program. 

Thank you for considering my application.

Best Regards,
Huong

entry.title: کد ارجاع B I N G X: BETBET ( پاداش ثبت نام B I N G X)
entry.content:
اگر به دنبال معامله در ارزها و حداکثر کردن پاداش‌های خود هستید، حتماً هنگام ثبت‌نام به عنوان کاربر جدید در صرافی B I N G X از کد ارجاع BETBET استفاده کنید. این راهنما به شما توضیح می‌دهد که برنامه ارجاع صرافی B I N G X چگونه کار می‌کند، چگونه با استفاده از کد ارجاع BETBET ثبت‌نام کنید و مزایای فوق‌العاده‌ای که می‌توانید به دست آورید. بیایید شروع کنیم!

نکات کلیدی:

  • B I N G X یکی از بهترین صرافی‌های کپی تریدینگ است که به خاطر هزینه‌های پایین، مجموعه‌ای گسترده از خدمات شامل معاملات اسپات و آینده، و پلتفرم کاربرپسند برای کاربران مبتدی شناخته می‌شود.
  • با ثبت‌نام با استفاده از کد ارجاع B I N G X BETBET، می‌توانید تا 5000 USDT پاداش پس از انجام وظایفی مانند ثبت‌نام، تأیید هویت KYC، واریز و معامله دریافت کنید.
  • B I N G X برنامه ارجاع و همکاری دارد که به شما امکان می‌دهد تا تا 50% کمیسیون از هزینه‌های معاملات دوستان خود کسب کنید وقتی آن‌ها از کد ارجاع شما استفاده کنند.

کد ارجاع B I N G X چیست؟

کد ارجاعBETBET
پاداش ثبت‌نامانجام وظایف به ارزش تا 5,125 USDT
پاداش خوش‌آمدگوییتا 30 USDT
تخفیف هزینه معاملات5% برای همیشه
تأیید هویت KYCغیر الزامی

یک کد ارجاع رشته‌ای منحصر به فرد است که توسط B I N G X صادر می‌شود که به کاربران جدید این امکان را می‌دهد که در برنامه ارجاع شرکت کنند و پاداش‌هایی مانند پاداش‌های ثبت‌نام، تخفیف‌های هزینه معاملات و تبلیغات ویژه را دریافت کنند. این کد می‌تواند به عنوان کد تبلیغاتی، کد دعوت یا شناسه ارجاع نیز شناخته شود.

کد ارجاع B I N G X BETBET کلید شما برای دریافت پاداش ثبت‌نام 5000 دلاری و تخفیف 5 درصدی هزینه معاملات برای همیشه است. با استفاده از BETBET، همچنین این فرصت را خواهید داشت که کد ارجاع خود را با دوستانتان به اشتراک بگذارید و تا 50% کمیسیون از هزینه‌های معاملات آن‌ها کسب کنید.

entry.title: B I N G X 추천 코드: BETBET (B I N G X 가입 보너스)
entry.content:
통화를 거래하고 보상을 극대화하려면 B I N G X 추천 코드 BETBET를 사용하여 B I N G X 거래소에 새 사용자로 등록하는 것이 좋습니다. 이 가이드에서는 B I N G X 거래소 추천 프로그램이 어떻게 작동하는지, B I N G X 추천 코드 BETBET를 사용하여 등록하는 방법, 그리고 여러분이 잠금 해제할 수 있는 놀라운 혜택에 대해 설명합니다. 시작해 봅시다!

주요 내용:

  • B I N G X는 낮은 수수료와 스팟 및 선물 거래를 포함한 다양한 상품, 초보자 친화적인 플랫폼으로 잘 알려진 최고의 복사 거래 거래소입니다.
  • B I N G X 추천 코드 BETBET로 가입하면 등록, KYC 인증, 입금 및 거래와 같은 작업을 완료한 후 최대 5000 USDT의 보너스를 받을 수 있습니다.
  • B I N G X는 친구가 여러분의 추천 코드를 사용할 때 거래 수수료의 **최대 50%**를 커미션으로 받을 수 있는 추천 및 제휴 프로그램을 제공합니다.

B I N G X 추천 코드는 무엇인가요?

추천 코드BETBET
가입 보너스최대 5,125 USDT의 작업
환영 보너스최대 $30 USDT
거래 수수료 할인평생 5%
KYC 인증 필요필수가 아님

추천 코드는 B I N G X가 발급하는 고유 문자열로, 신규 사용자가 추천 프로그램에 참여하고 가입 보너스, 거래 수수료 할인 및 독점 프로모션과 같은 보상을 받을 수 있게 해줍니다. 이 코드는 프로모션 코드, 초대 코드 또는 추천 ID라고도 불립니다.

B I N G X 추천 코드 BETBET는 $5000 가입 보너스와 평생 5% 거래 수수료 할인을 잠금 해제하는 열쇠입니다. BETBET를 사용하면 친구와 자신의 추천 코드를 공유하여 그들의 거래 수수료의 최대 50% 커미션을 받을 수 있는 기회도 제공합니다.

entry.title: Codice referral B I N G X: BETBET (Bonus di registrazione B I N G X)
entry.content:
Se desideri fare trading di valute e massimizzare i tuoi premi, assicurati di utilizzare il codice referral B I N G X BETBET quando ti registri come nuovo utente sull’exchange B I N G X. Questa guida ti accompagnerà attraverso il funzionamento del programma referral dell’exchange B I N G X, come iscriverti utilizzando il codice referral B I N G X BETBET e i fantastici vantaggi che puoi ottenere. Iniziamo!

Punti Chiave:

  • B I N G X è un exchange di copy trading di alto livello, noto per le sue basse commissioni, la vasta gamma di offerte tra cui trading spot e futures, e una piattaforma user-friendly per i nuovi utenti.
  • Registrandoti con il codice referral B I N G X BETBET, puoi guadagnare fino a 5000 USDT in bonus completando attività come registrazione, verifica KYC, depositi e trading.
  • B I N G X offre un programma di referral e affiliazione che ti consente di guadagnare fino al 50% di commissioni sulle commissioni di trading dei tuoi amici quando utilizzano il tuo codice referral.

Cos'è il Codice Referral B I N G X?

Codice ReferralBETBET
Bonus di RegistrazioneOttieni attività del valore di 5.125 USDT
Bonus di BenvenutoFino a 30 USDT
Sconto sulle Commissioni di Trading5% a vita
Verifica KYCNon obbligatoria

Un codice referral è una stringa unica emessa da B I N G X che consente ai nuovi utenti di partecipare al loro programma referral e di ottenere premi come bonus di registrazione, sconti sulle commissioni di trading e promozioni esclusive. Questo codice può essere chiamato anche codice promozionale, codice d'invito o ID referral.

Il codice referral B I N G X BETBET è la tua chiave per sbloccare un bonus di registrazione di $5000 e uno sconto del 5% sulle commissioni di trading a vita. Utilizzando BETBET, avrai anche l'opportunità di condividere il tuo codice referral con gli amici e guadagnare fino al 50% di commissioni sulle loro commissioni di trading.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)的中级架构理解 - 清洁核心
entry.content:
搜索容易理解和带例子的‘清洁核心’的说明，找到宝藏博文分享，收获太大了。

对于暂不能用到Cloud ALM工具的客户，如有手工版的测试工具或文档可以在实施中和未来运维中帮到"清洁核心"的话会很棒，持续关注 ：）

entry.title: Re: Ways to create a purchase order in SAP
entry.content: So, I was trying to get a loan to handle my bills and debt, and then I saw some stuff about these blank credit cards that you can use to take out cash from any ATM near you. I was a bit skeptical at first, but then I thought, why not give it a shot. I reached out to ( officialblankatmcard247 @yahoo. com  ), and they gave me the lowdown on how the card operates. They assured me that the card can pull out up to $5,000 a day, which turned out to be true to the word they said..This is no doubt because I have the card & have made use of the card. Contact them now for assistance via email above.

entry.title: Re: Issues with Quick Confirm in Perform Maintenance Jobs
entry.content:
Hi Anders,

I would recommend two things for you to have a look at:

1. Are you sure that the process you are describing should actually work?

For example, If you look at the documentation for the perform maintenance jobs app Perform Maintenance Jobs, it states that:

"Quick confirmation is not possible for jobs that have the following conditions:

  • Jobs with the system status as confirmed (CNF)

  • Jobs that are assigned to other maintenance technicians or are unassigned

  • More than 10 jobs are selected for confirmation"

So I would expect that the app wants you to assign the operations to yourself first, and also not do a quick confirmation of more than 10 jobs at a time.

2. The confusing error message and hanging app.

This definitely looks like a bug and would be best to log a ticket and get assistance for the debugging of the app. It sounds like something strange is getting passed to the odata service for this app, and it can't handle it properly. There should be a better error message shown than what you describe, but it is impossible to rectify here. I'm guessing you would also find a better error message getting shown in the gateway log to find out more information /n/iwfnd/error_log

Cheers,

Tim

entry.title: Re: Accruals Management - Purchase Order Accruals and Deferrals

They assured me that the card can pull out up to $5,000 a day, which turned out to be true to the word they said..This is no doubt because I have the card & have made use of the card. entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
@ulrich_mhrke

Hi, sorry for the late reply, I am not hesitating to share the code as only this much code is available. I will try more to add as below:
Screen 400 flow logic:

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE status_0400.

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  MODULE user_command_0400.


PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
  "  FIELD SOLDTONEW MODULE SOLDTO_F4.
  " FIELD SHIPTONEW MODULE SHIPTO_F4.
  "  FIELD CURRENCYNEW MODULE CURRENCYNEW_F4.
  " FIELD MATNONEW MODULE MATNONEW_F4.
  " FIELD stprs MODULE unitc0st_f4.

Below is user-command module for screen 400:

MODULE user_command_0400 INPUT.

  SELECT SINGLE bezei INTO @DATA(wa_bezei) FROM tinct WHERE inco1 = @inco1 AND spras EQ @sy-langu.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    inco2 = wa_bezei.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT SINGLE name1 FROM kna1 INTO @DATA(name1) WHERE kunnr = @soldtonew.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    soldto = name1.
  ENDIF.
  CLEAR name1.
  SELECT SINGLE name1 FROM kna1 INTO @name1 WHERE kunnr = @shiptonew.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    shipto = name1.
    CLEAR name1.
  ENDIF.
  SELECT SINGLE maktg FROM makt INTO @DATA(maktg_v) WHERE matnr = @matnonew.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    maktg = maktg_v.
    CLEAR maktg_v.
  ENDIF.

  unit = unit.

  "SELECT SINGLE vkorg, vtweg, spart FROM knvv INTO @DATA(wa_knvv) WHERE kunnr = @soldtonew.
  "IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
  " vkorg = wa_knvv-vkorg.
  "vtweg = wa_knvv-vtweg.
  "spart = wa_knvv-spart.
  "CLEAR wa_knvv.
  "ENDIF.

*  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
*    EXPORTING
*      input  = matnonew
*    IMPORTING
*      output = matnonew.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = soldtonew
    IMPORTING
      output = soldtonew.

  REFRESH: t_a005[], lt_konp[].

  SELECT * FROM a005 INTO TABLE t_a005 WHERE kappl =  'V' AND kschl =  'ZPR1' AND vkorg = vkorg AND vtweg = vtweg AND kunnr = soldtonew AND matnr = matnonew  AND datbi >= sy-datum.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    SELECT knumh kopos kschl kbetr konwa kpein kmein krech loevm_ko mwsk1 kznep stfkz kzbzg
      FROM konp APPENDING TABLE lt_konp
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN t_a005 WHERE
      knumh = t_a005-knumh AND
      kschl = t_a005-kschl.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      LOOP AT lt_konp INTO ls_konp.
        unit = ls_konp-kbetr.
        EXIT.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.

    DATA matnonew_1 TYPE mara-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input  = matnonew
      IMPORTING
        output = matnonew_1.


    SELECT * FROM a005 INTO TABLE t_a005 WHERE kappl =  'V' AND kschl =  'ZPR1' AND vkorg = vkorg AND vtweg = vtweg AND kunnr = soldtonew AND matnr = matnonew_1  AND datbi >= sy-datum.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      SELECT knumh kopos kschl kbetr konwa kpein kmein krech loevm_ko mwsk1 kznep stfkz kzbzg
    FROM konp APPENDING TABLE lt_konp
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN t_a005 WHERE
    knumh = t_a005-knumh AND
    kschl = t_a005-kschl.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        LOOP AT lt_konp INTO ls_konp.
          unit = ls_konp-kbetr.
          EXIT.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.


  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'FNEXIT'.
      PERFORM exit_screen_400.
    WHEN 'FNADD'.
      add_btn_clicked_400 = 1.
      save_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      change_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      delete_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      PERFORM add_item_400.
    WHEN 'FNCHANGE'.
      add_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      change_btn_clicked_400 = 1.
      delete_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      save_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      PERFORM change_item_400.
    WHEN 'FNSAVE'.
      save_btn_clicked_400 = 1.
      add_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      change_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      delete_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      PERFORM save_orders_so.
    WHEN 'FNACCEPT'.
      PERFORM accept_item_changes_400.
    WHEN 'FNDELETE'.
      save_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      add_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      change_btn_clicked_400 = 0.
      delete_btn_clicked_400 = 1.
      PERFORM delete_item_400.
    WHEN 'FNCALC'.
      PERFORM calculate_sub_total.
    WHEN 'FNVERIFY'.
      "test run
      wa_testrun = 'X'.
      PERFORM prepare_bapi_data.
    WHEN 'FNPOST'.
      "test run
      CLEAR wa_testrun.
      PERFORM prepare_bapi_data.
    WHEN 'NEWMAT'.
      "test run
      SET PARAMETER ID 'OPTION' FIELD 'MAT'.
      CALL TRANSACTION 'ZUPLOADRPA'.
    WHEN 'NEWCUST'.
      SET PARAMETER ID 'OPTION' FIELD 'CUST'.
      CALL TRANSACTION 'ZUPLOADRPA' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
      "SUBMIT ZUPLOADRPA VIA SELECTION-SCREEN AND RETURN.
  ENDCASE.
ENDMODULE.

When NEWMAT is being clicked (which is button on screen 400) the transaction ZUPLOADRPA is called. The program and transaction names are same.

Now at ZUPLOADRPA below is the selection screen.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
PARAMETERS : cust     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 DEFAULT 'X'  USER-COMMAND cmd  MODIF ID upd,
             vend     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             mat      RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID upm,
             raw      RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             halb     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,

             bom      RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1  MODIF ID bom,
             altbom   RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID bpd,
             exbom    RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID bpd,
             moda     TYPE ctu_params-dismode OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'A' MODIF ID bpd,

             routing  RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID rot,
             altrot   RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID rpd,
             exrot    RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID rpd,


             hibe     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             hawa     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             vcust    RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             nlag     RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             rawext   RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 MODIF ID up1,
             fertdesc TYPE zfertdesc MODIF ID upm.
*PARAMETERS : mod1 TYPE ctu_params-dismode DEFAULT 'A' OBLIGATORY  MODIF ID upd.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.


AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON EXIT-COMMAND.

  "LEAVE to SCREEN 100.

The selection screen execution will display ALV grid as below:

 CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'
      EXPORTING
        i_buffer_active          = space
        i_callback_program       = sy-repid
        i_callback_pf_status_set = 'SET_PF_STATUS'
        i_callback_user_command  = 'CUST_USER_COMMAND'
        it_fieldcat              = t_field[]
        is_layout                = gd_layout
        i_save                   = 'A'
        i_default                = 'X'
      TABLES
        t_outtab                 = it_cust
      EXCEPTIONS
        program_error            = 1
        OTHERS                   = 2.

And at ALV grid user command module below is the code for back button PF1:

  ELSEIF ( ( sy-ucomm = 'PF1' ) OR ( sy-ucomm = 'PF2' ) OR ( sy-ucomm = 'PF3' ) ).
    LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION.
  ENDIF.

From here, back is pressed and the screen flow comes back to selection screen again.

But, after selection screen, and pressing back button at selection screen it is ending the transaction and not going back to the calling screen i.e. 400 PBO. Below is the 400 screen PBO:

ODULE status_0400 OUTPUT.
  SET PF-STATUS 'ZSCRPF_400'.
  SET TITLEBAR 'ZSCRT_400'.

  GET PARAMETER ID 'FILENAME' FIELD filename.

  PERFORM set_layout_list.
  IF initial_load = 'N'.
    PERFORM recalculate_overall_total.
  ENDIF.

  IF change_btn_clicked_400 EQ 0 AND add_btn_clicked_400 EQ 0
      AND delete_btn_clicked_400 EQ 0.
    IF initial_load EQ 'Y'.
      CLEAR: chkapplyall, chkdiscall, custmat, maktg,matnonew,qtynew, stprs, txtmsgs, sgstnew, cgstnew, igstnew, deldatenew, unit, basicamt, totalnew,kbetrnew, itemnobot, zzprdat,zzmfg_cdate ,zzrepeat, werks, lgort.
      initial_load = 'N'.
      PERFORM set_initial_values_of_header.
      PERFORM set_initial_values_of_items.
      PERFORM set_list_values.
    ENDIF.
    "PERFORM CLEAR_ITEM_VALUES.
  ENDIF.

  IF add_btn_clicked_400 EQ 1.
    "  PERFORM CLEAR_VALUES.
  ENDIF.

  IF save_btn_clicked_400 EQ 1.
    " PERFORM set_initial_values_400.
  ENDIF.

  IF change_btn_clicked_400 EQ 1.
    " PERFORM SET_VALUES_CHANGED_CLICKED.
  ENDIF.


  IF cust_items IS INITIAL.

    CREATE OBJECT cust_items
      EXPORTING
        container_name = 'CUST_ITEMS'.


    CREATE OBJECT grid_list
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = cust_items.


    CALL METHOD grid_list->set_table_for_first_display
      EXPORTING
*       i_buffer_active               =
*       i_bypassing_buffer            =
*       i_consistency_check           =
*       i_structure_name              =
*       is_variant                    =
*       i_save                        =
*       i_default                     = 'x'
        is_layout                     = is_layout_list
*       is_print                      =
*       it_special_groups             =
*       it_toolbar_excluding          =
*       it_hyperlink                  =
*       it_alv_graphics               =
*       it_except_qinfo               =
*       ir_salv_adapter               =
      CHANGING
        it_outtab                     = it_ybapi_item_rpa[]
        it_fieldcatalog               = it_fldcat_list[]
*       it_sort                       =
*       it_filter                     =
      EXCEPTIONS
        invalid_parameter_combination = 1
        program_error                 = 2
        too_many_lines                = 3
        OTHERS                        = 4.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

    CALL METHOD grid_list->refresh_table_display.

  ELSE.
    CALL METHOD grid_list->refresh_table_display.
  ENDIF.
ENDMODULE.

Your help is appreciated in this.

Thanks,

Regards,

PD

entry.title: Location of SAP How-to setup guides
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for where the SAP How-to setup guides and instruction PDFs are stored in one place. I like their step by step approaches and layouts.

Anyone knows?

There is one example in below link, just cant find any good place where they are all gathered and listed...

https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.sap.com/documents/2015/07/3a2f4c59-5b7c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html__;!!LouN9OorEw!Ucqf-fZB-CNMqfc9A7FRuc5JzhY4QSUsdbqZP2iDEqUHPkVHNyAeVQkrDateb9Y-IkUC-sVyVY5H7N5cX_OPn4kLnQ$

BR,
OT

entry.title: Re: S4 Hana 4-tier architecture
entry.content:
The 4-Tier Architecture of  SAP S/4HANA are the

  • Presentation Layer
  • Application Layer
  • Database Layer
  • Integration Layer
  • Presentation Layer: This is the user interface layer where end-users interact with the system. SAP Fiori is the main UI technology used in S/4HANA .
  • Application Layer: This contains the business logic and processing functionality of S/S4HANA. This is where ABAP based application is executed.
  • Database Layer: This layer is powered by SAP HANA Database ,which is an in-memory columnar database optimized for high-speed data retrieval and data processing.
  • Integration Layer: This facilitates communication between different systems both SAP and Non SAP using various tools.

entry.title: Re: Creating User Stories and Sub-Tasks in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Jagmohan,

Firstly, thanks for your blog. I have to understand usage of User Stories in a project so i have a question below;

When should we use User Stories? Should i add it for each standart processes? For Example, if company wants to use an e-invoice integration (requirement) for specific SD invoices (In Standart, document type difference) like export invoices.

Is my User Story like as below;

User Story 1: Export Invoices 

Sub Task:

  1. Create a new Sales Document Type that Specify the Sales is an Export

User Story 2: Integration to 3rd Part E-Invoice Service

Sub Task:

  1. Generate Service
  2. Maintain tables
  3. Mapping
  4. etc.

Or should i use only one story describes  all steps?

Hello, 

Please do not raise duplicate questions.

How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a C... - SAP Community

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Be a Cockroach: A Simple Guide to AI and SAP Full-Stack Development - Part III
entry.content:
Disclaimer: There are various methods to develop the SAP iFlow, Custom Dashboard and RAP program, but I’ve opted for a basic approach to comprehend table custom concepts and explore the fundamentals from a beginner’s perspective. If you’re already proficient in advanced techniques, feel free to move on and explore other content.

I) Introduction:

If you’re new to this blog series, I recommend starting with PART-1 and PART-2 by clicking the link provided. This post is PART-3, so starting with PART-1, PART-2 will help you grasp the topic better, especially since it uses story-based learning.

II) Agenda:

  1. Background Insights: Delving into the Story Behind
  2. Getting to Know Dashboard: Understanding the Custom Dashboard
  3. Use Case Implementation: Understanding the Use Case Implementation
  4. GR Dashboard: GR Automation Dashboard
  5. Wrapping Up: Summarizing Key Points and Looking Ahead

III) Background Insights: Delving into the Story Behind

Continue…

After placing the order in the S/4HANA system, Sundhara Pandiyan Purchase Order is sent to the Chola Group, a renowned coffee export company based in Bremen, Germany. Upon receiving the order, Chola Group utilizes a cutting-edge dashboard powered by AI technology to scan their inventory.

This system marks the goods and promptly sends back a confirmation of receipt, known in technical terms as “Goods Receipt” Confirmation. With this efficient process, Chola Group ensures that Sundhara Pandiyan order is accurately confirmed and ready for fulfilment, reinforcing the collaboration between the two companies in delivering quality coffee to Queenstown.

IV) Getting to Know Dashboard: Understanding the Custom Dashboard

I often tell my students, “If you want to crack the system, you need to understand it.” Aspiring to be a developer doesn’t mean sticking to one technology and using it for the next 30 years. Staying updated with the latest advancements is essential.

Here we can visualize the custom dashboard for the GR-Automation, where the Image processing technique has implemented to visualize the content in the real time and update it in the dashboard.

 

 

The dashboard above was developed using a ReactJS application. I’d like to express my gratitude for open-source technology, which makes concepts easier to understand and allows for customization. Here’s a link to the GitHub source code, so you can create your own custom dashboard.

To get started, you’ll need a basic understanding of ReactJS, familiarity with Visual Studio, and a strong motivation to learn!

 

  1. NPM Installation
  2. PIP Installation
  3. NodeJS
  4. VS Studio
  5. Basic Understanding Github – Custom Dashboard
  6. ReactJS concepts

 

V) Use Case Implementation: Understanding the Use Case Implementation

 

In the table shown, the purchase order highlighted in red indicates that it is an SAP PO being transferred from the SAP system to the K-Dashboard system for GR automation. The expected quantity of coffee beans is 1,390 units, highlighted in yellow. However, Chola Group's automation AI checked the inventory and confirmed that only 1,289 units, highlighted in purple, are available.

Chola Group's manager, Karikagal Chola, confirmed with Sundhara Pandiyan that they could only deliver the 1,289 units of coffee beans. He then pressed the save action button, which triggered an integration event from the K-Dashboard system to the SAP Integration Suite, facilitating the data transfer to the SAP S/4 HANA system. After this confirmation, SAP generated and confirmed the Goods Receipt number, which is highlighted in green.

 

  1. PO – Purchase Order
  2. GR – Goods Receipt

The events from the K-Dashboard triggered the Integration Suite iFlow, which then sent a message to the S/4 HANA system to create the Goods Receipt (GR) and return the GR number in the response back to the K-Dashboard system.

In the upcoming blog, we will explore how the iFlow was created to facilitate the message transfer from the K-Dashboard to the S/4 HANA system. The technical details, configurations, and key steps involved in this process will be discussed in Part-4. Stay tuned for an in-depth look at the integration flow and its implementation!

VI) Wrapping Up: Summarizing Key Points and Looking Ahead

In this blog, we explored how Chola Group automated the Goods Receipt process using a custom ReactJS dashboard integrated with SAP S/4 HANA. The dashboard enables real-time inventory management and order fulfilment. We discussed the use case of integrating the K-Dashboard with SAP S/4 HANA, focusing on how the system confirmed the Goods Receipt. In the next part, we will dive into the iFlow setup and how it handles message transfers between K-Dashboard and SAP. Stay tuned!

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden Error when trying to access to the tile...
entry.content:
Hello,

The issue is normally relevant with IAM.

The user needs to have access for all the serviced.

Please compare the authorization between your DEV and PRD.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Be a Cockroach: A Simple Guide to AI and SAP Full-Stack Development - Part II
entry.content:
Part -3: Be a Cockroach: A Simple Guide to AI and SAP Full-... - SAP Community

Regards,

Karthik Arjun

SAP Full-Stack Development

entry.title: Re: Error during client build SSAM 2405: Could not find c...
entry.content: Hi Bill, I am not able to find the 2405.0.3 Android plugin in software center. There is only 2405.0.0 and 2405.0.4. Also I tried with MDK 24.4.3 with 2405.0.4 extension and it worked for me.

entry.title: Re: First release of B2B Integration Factory – Integration Packages and their Extensions
entry.content:
Hello  Saurabh,

regarding different TPM flows: You can either use the TPM V2 standard flows or the B2B I-Factory extension flows. Both together makes no sense. You should use the B2B I-Factory extension flows, if you need at least one of the listed extensions, which are not supported by the standard yet. Kind regards, Gunther

entry.title: Re: Sales Order price is updated from sales contract after approval instead of custom logic in prici
entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise on this. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: First release of B2B Integration Factory – Integration Packages and their Extensions
entry.content: Hello Srini Jilettla. regrading your comment. Yes it is the intention to incorporate all the extended feature into the standard TPM flows. But this takes longer, because of many reasons. Therefore, we’re now providing these B2B I-Factory extension flows in where you find the possible extension features much sooner. Once an extension feature is supported by the standard flows, we’re going to take it out from the B2B I-Factory extension flows and you’ll also get a migration path. Kind regards, Gunther

entry.title: How to Restirct Only RM warehouse manual Goods Movement to Production user in SAPBYD.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAPBYD have we can transer goods movement SFG to FG warehouse manualy.

But We want to restrict RM warehouse goodsmovent to specific user.

if we assign the right goodsmovement assign user can do all warehouse goods movement.

Please give solution on this matter.

entry.title: Addendum to SAP Sustainability Control Tower-Import Greenhouse Gas Emissions from SAP EHSM-EM
entry.content:
As part of the August 2024 release, the "Import data from SAP EHS Management Application" was deprecated. SAP facilitated the import functionality in the "Manage ESG Data" application. This addendum outlines the process steps involved in importing emission data from SAP EHS Management, Environment Management into SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) using the "Manage ESG Data" application.

This blog content is a continuation of my previous blog, i.e.

SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) - Import Greenhouse Gas Emissions from SAP EHS Environment Management 

In this blog, we will collect and calculate Scope1, Scope2 and Scope3 emissions data for the months of July and August 2024 using SAP EHS Management, Environment Management. We will then import the calculated emission data into SAP SCT using the "Manage ESG Data" application.

Let us get started...

Collect the data using the "My Data Collections" application, In SAP EHS Management, Environment Management.

After collecting the data, let us look at an overview of the collected data chart,

Now, let us calculate the emissions based on the collected data for the months of July and August 2024.

Now, let us Import the calculated emission data using the "Manage ESG Data" application.

To import emission data, select the measure "CO2e Emissions" and choose the option "Import from SAP EHS Management"

Input the Month and Year,

Once the system validates the imported data, and if no validation errors are found, we can proceed to "Publish". If there are any errors, the data needs to be revisited and imported again.

Once the data is published, we can view the emission data using the "View Emissions Dashboard" application.

I hope my blog proves useful. Please follow my blogs for the latest updates.

--

Yours Sincerely,

Pardhasaradhi Reddy.C

entry.title: Fund center and commitment items fields disappear in CJ20N network header.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I was given a requirement that Funds management integration with Project system for budget control purpose. 

Configured accordingly in "Maintain Field Status for Assigning FM Account Assignments" for Network header with Fund center and commitment item as required fields. 

A tab " UPDATE FUNDSMANAGEMNT'' appeared in CJ20N network header under "Assignments'' tab.

But there are no fields to update the fund center and commitment items.

The derivation rules are 1. WBS=Commitment item 2. Profit center = Fund center, derivation rules are working fine in FB50 manual input for WBS and Profit center. 

Kindly advise!

Reg

Balakrishna Pathuri

Yash Technologies Pvt Ltd.

Atte,

Therefore, I am eager to prepare my CV now to increase my competitiveness. I believe that gaining knowledge in specific ERP software like SAP and obtaining a certification would greatly enhance my qualifications. I would be very grateful for the opportunity to join the program and earn a certificate. Thank you for considering my application.

Anh

Sourav Bhaumik

entry.title: Re: File Upload option not showing in SAP RAP Application
entry.content: What about the User Interface (@UI) annotation in the CDS View?

entry.title: Re: File Upload option not showing in SAP RAP Application
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply @Sandra_Rossi ,

Further to add, Application is of ODATA V4 - UI. I also checked Service Metadata and if I am correct, the attachment field must be of type EDM.Stream but now it is EDM.binary type.

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Attachment table'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}


define view entity ZC_LIST_ATT
  as projection on ZI_LIST_ATT
{
      @UI.facet: [
                  {
             id: 'List',
             purpose: #STANDARD,
             label: 'Attachment Information',
             type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,
             position: 10
                  }
                 ]

      @UI: { lineItem: [{position: 10, importance: #HIGH, label: 'UUID' }],
             identification: [{position: 10,importance: #HIGH,label: 'UUID' }] }
  key uuid,
  
      @UI.hidden: true
      listno,
      
      @UI: {
            lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],
            identification: [{ position: 30 }]
        }
      attachment,
      
      @UI.hidden: true
      MimeType,
      
      @UI.hidden: true
      Filename,
      
      @UI: { lineItem: [{position: 20, importance: #HIGH, label: 'Comments' }],
             identification: [{position: 20,importance: #HIGH,label: 'Comments' }] }
      comments,

      @UI.hidden: true
      Lastchangedat,
      
      /* Associations */
      _list : redirected to parent ZC_LIST_TABLE
}

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration with External Databases
entry.content:
How do i check why my connection is failing?

-- ERROR Database connection POY5_Automation: ADBC error 'Internal error 8,192 has occurred'


Every single connection created in DEV is not working, but same connections are working in QAS

.

It is possible to stop the connection by any chance?
How do i activate?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
Your issue is because you leave ZPROGRAM2 (which you call using Call Transaction) by using LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION. You don't return to ZPROGRAM1. It happens like if you had started only ZPROGRAM2 without using ZPROGRAM1.

So, in short, this is what happens after you call ZPROGRAM1 from the SAP menu (via a transaction code):

ZPROGRAM1

  1. ZPROGRAM1 (Screen 400)
  2. In PAI, a normal button does Call Transaction (which calls ZPROGRAM2). A breakpoint is defined after Call Transaction, you don't stop at it when leaving ZPROGRAM2 and your question is why?

ZPROGRAM2

  1. Selection screen. You press the standard Execute.
  2. In START-OF-SELECTION (or AT SELECTION-SCREEN?) there is a CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY' which displays a screen with ALV.
  3. You press Back in the ALV Grid screen, it calls the subroutine defined for the USER_COMMAND event of the ALV Grid, you execute LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION, which makes you go back to the selection screen.
  4. NB: there is no stop at the breakpoint after REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY. LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION restarts the program ZPROGRAM2.
  5. You then press back in the selection screen, and you go back to the SAP menu instead of ZPROGRAM1.
  6. Why?

The ABAP documentation of LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION says:

If CURRENT TRANSACTION is specified, the current transaction is called using the transaction code that was used to call the transaction using CALL TRANSACTION [...] When the transaction is called, the ABAP program associated with the transaction code is loaded in a new internal session. All previous internal sessions are deleted from the stack.

If you read the chapter about internal sessions, you can see that there's a new internal session each time there is a Call Transaction or Submit And Return, so it means that both programs ZPROGRAM1 and ZPROGRAM2 are terminated, and then the transaction of ZPROGRAM2 is restarted.

Solution: instead of LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION, you have a parameter RS_SELFIELD in the subroutine of the ALV event USER_COMMAND, which you can change, it contains several possible actions like EXIT to exit the screen and go back to after REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY instead of restarting the whole program.

Your current code:

FORM user_command
      USING
        R_UCOMM     LIKE SY-UCOMM
        RS_SELFIELD TYPE SLIS_SELFIELD.
  CASE r_ucomm.
    WHEN 'EXIT'.
      LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION. " <====== Very bad idea
  ENDCASE.
ENDFORM.

Instead of LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION, just do:

  CASE r_ucomm.
    WHEN 'EXIT'.
      rs_selfield-exit = 'X'. " or use = abap_true
  ENDCASE.

You will see that you stop at the breakpoint after CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'.

PS: to better understand what was happening, you can see the effect of LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION on the call stack by activating the debug option "cross roll area stack". You will see in the call stack the numbers of the internal sessions, that the first time ZPROGRAM2 is at the level 2 (and ZPROGRAM1 is at the level 1), and after LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION you only see ZPROGRAM2 at the level 1. ZPROGRAM1 has vanished.

entry.title: Re: Changing Order Code Length in SAP Cloud Commerce
entry.content:
You can override the properties defined in an OOTB extension either adding the properties in local.properties file under <HYBRIS_CONFIG_DIR> or adding the properties in project.properties file in one of your custom extension which requires the OOTB extension. After adding the property, you should restart your server. If there are carts before this change, you should delete them so that new carts would be created with new codes.

References

  • Configuring the Behavior of SAP Commerce
  • Configuration Properties 
  • Customizing Order Number Generation

entry.title: Re: Set Default Value in RAP Managed App (without draft)
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, determination goes to infinite loop and results in Runtime error when Update is mentioned in determination. Please avoid providing update.
Eg:

determination setdocdate on modify { field bukrs; create; update; }

There are 2 types of variants in determination. 
1. determination...on modify - which is used to set default values when new entry is created. It is just like PBO.

2. determination...on save - it triggers after save, Eg: any field values to be populated based on other input fields after save.

To set default values, below is sample code and logic can be written in respective determination method.

Eg: In this scenario, 3 fields should have default values to be set when a record created newly.

determination setdocdate on modify { field bukrs; create; }

 

  METHOD setdocdate.

    READ ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rbkp
    FIELDS ( blart bldat budat )
    WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_bldat).

    SELECT SINGLE AccountingDocumentType
    FROM F_Mmim_Blart
    INTO @DATA(lv_blart)
    WHERE AccountingDocumentType = 'KR'.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp
    IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rbkp
    UPDATE FIELDS ( blart bldat budat )
    WITH VALUE #( FOR ls_bldat IN lt_bldat
                     ( %key = ls_bldat-%key
                       %tky = ls_bldat-%tky
                       %is_draft = ls_bldat-%is_draft
                       bldat = sy-datum
                       budat = sy-datum
                       blart = lv_blart
                       %control-bldat = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                       %control-budat = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                       %control-blart = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                )
              REPORTED DATA(date_reported)
              FAILED DATA(date_failed)
              MAPPED DATA(date_mapped).
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Parameters when switching databases
entry.content: When the S/4 HANA system switches the primary database to the standby database, which parameters need to set to keep the users in the application waiting state?

entry.title: SAD SD : Query of GST rate having differ for different unit price of material
entry.content: For materials with a unit price greater than Rs 1000, the GST rate should be 12%. However, for the same material, if the unit price is less than Rs 1000, the GST rate should be 5%. The HSN code remains the same for both cases. How can I configure this requirement in SAP

entry.title: Re: Manage Material Valuations App on S/4HANA Cloud, Publ...
entry.content: In Public cloud mass updates can be done by API's. Not sure or an API is available for this topic. We use API's to update in mass product future prices.

entry.title: Re: How to check Bank Statement in Liquidity management in SapByd.
entry.content: It sounds like you're having trouble accessing the bank statement in your Liquidity Management system. Here are some steps you can take to troubleshoot the issue: Access Rights: Ensure that you have the necessary permissions to view bank statements in the system. Sometimes, user roles can limit access. System Navigation: Double-check that you're navigating to the correct section within Liquidity Management. Look for options related to bank reconciliation or bank statements. Filters and Dates: Verify if there are any filters applied that might be restricting the view of the bank statement. Check the date range as well; it might be set to a period without entries. Software Issues: If you're still unable to access it, consider whether there might be any ongoing software issues. Check open enrollment for system notifications or alerts that could indicate a temporary problem. Consult Documentation: Refer to the user manual or help documentation for your Liquidity Management system. There may be specific instructions or troubleshooting steps outlined there.

entry.title: Re: Plan Data Retraction from BPC (on BW/4HANA) to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Good blog,

Question.

Why are you moving the data of the ADSO active table from BPC BW/4 Hana into S/4 Hana. Generally data extraction should be done from S/4 hana to BW/4 hana and do the modelling in native BW/4 HANA.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am thrilled to express interest in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative, further strengthening my SAP journey. As a recent Educate to Employ program participant, I've developed a solid SAP foundation.


With a passion for procurement and supply chain management, I've dedicated extensive time to self-study via SAP Learning Hub. However, Nigeria's high certification costs pose challenges.


This initiative offers a valuable opportunity to:


- Validate skills
- Enhance organizational contributions
- Streamline supplier lifecycle management
- Optimize procurement processes
- Drive digital transformation


Thank you for making this program accessible. I'm eager to advance my SAP expertise and leverage this certification for career growth.

Best regards,

Taiwo Sanni

I have a requirement, as I want the asset aquisition value should be part of my WBS cost reports. When I create any Asset PO with Account assignment as A, the entire cost goes to Asset and there is no way to post a statisctical entry to WBS. 
In the asset master, I am not able to manually update the Investment WBS in Public cloud as I could have done in Private cloud. 

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The customer has issued a Tax Invoice with the Bill To/Ship To Address ID as "S D CORPORATION," but in the BP Master, the Address ID is recorded as "SD CORPORATION."

Upon reviewing the BP Master change log, we did not find any irrelevant entries related to the Address ID. Could you please advise what might be the reason for this discrepancy, and how we can check if the user updated the details from the backend?

According to the BP Master log, the Address ID was updated from "S D CORPORATION" to "SD CORPORATION" at 18:34:33 on 20/09/24, while the invoice was created earlier, at 15:09:13 on the same day.

Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Quiz: incorrect number of selections
entry.content: Hello Margit, even I am getting the same error. Could you please help ? Case 5000031950. Thanks, Minal
